series_metadata.series_description: Course or program equivalency approvals related to the Ohio Transfer Module (OTM), Transfer Assurance Guides (TAGs), Career-Technical Assurance Guides (CTAGs), Statewide Apprenticeship Pathways, and any other state-sponsored course or program equivalency initiatives. Documents include: course syllabi, institutional accreditation documents, instructor accreditation documents, and pacing documents (for Career-Technical programs).
